name: Chocolate Mint Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, stir together the flour, cocoa powder, baking powder, salt, and baking soda.
2. In another large bowl, beat together the sugar and shortening on high speed of a mixer until fluffy.
3. Beat in the egg and peppermint extract.
4. Alternately add dry ingredients to the creamed mixture with milk, beating well after each addition.
5. Pour batter into a greased and floured 9-inch round cake pan.
6. Bake at 350°F for 25-30 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
7. Cool on a rack for 10 minutes before turning out onto a wire rack to cool completely.
8. For frosting, beat together powdered sugar, butter, peppermint extract, and enough milk to make a spreadable consistency. Tint frosting green.
9. Place the cake layer on a serving platter. Frost the top and sides of the cake.
10. Decorate with mint halves.
11. Serve with ice cream (optional).
